authorship: deterministically generated by data/d-qa/build-dqa.py from the pinned source records; fixed question templates in-script; NO LLM authored, selected, or edited any item text; built by runner-2

files.gloss-corpus.jsonl: hash-pinned gloss dictionary + RAG corpus (text arms)
files.leak-check.json: leak-check evidence (build fails closed on violation)

normalisation: molecule groundingNote markup {urn:...|surface} rendered to its surface form, [m] molecule flags dropped, whitespace collapsed (render_plain in the builder); kernel-v0 glosses carry no markup and are used verbatim; build fails closed on residual markup
role: F2 eval inputs (registry pins definitional-qa-eval-set and gloss-corpus-and-rag-index both resolve to this corpus's kot-corpus-hash/1 digest)

split.control: items/control.jsonl — NOT-kernel-covered lemmas (M0b top-500 content mass, classes explicable/molecule/oos, minus kernel-v0 labels and molecules-v0 corpusLemmas), WordNet-3.1 glosses; kernel_checkable=false
split.covered: items/covered.jsonl — kernel-covered slice; every item names its record (urn + record_sha256) so the kernel verifier can score it
